query:
INSERT INTO virtual_folder_mount
                (id, virtual_node_id, real_folder_id, created_at, enabled, priority, recursive, sync_enabled, suppress_warnings)
            VALUES
                (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, 1, 0, 1, 0, 0)
            ON CONFLICT(virtual_node_id, real_folder_id) DO NOTHING;
